task: Fix two bugs in codemie analytics' --session <id> filter (sessionId never checked in matchesFilter/sessionMatchesFilter; loadSessions did not strip the completed_ filename prefix), plus an incidental unrelated typecheck fix in src/utils/auth.ts

component_scope.label: M
component_scope.affected: MetricsDataLoader (analytics data-loader: matchesFilter, sessionMatchesFilter, loadSessions, resolveSessionPath), getAuthenticatedClient (shared auth utility)

technical_risk.label: L
technical_risk.risk_factors: Filename-resolution edge case (interrupted/non-atomic completed_ rename by hook.ts) risked double-counting a session across two filename variants; incidental fix touches authentication client construction in src/utils/auth.ts (jwt_token -> external_token)
technical_risk.mitigation: Added seenSessionIds dedup guard plus regression tests covering both filename variants and the sessionId filter; both code-review.final findings (CR-001 missing coverage, CR-002 double-counting) resolved and verified in the code-review.check follow-up round

key_reasoning.reason: Bug fix required careful reasoning about a non-atomic filename-rename edge case that could silently double-count sessions; caught only in code review (CR-002), plus an incidental touch to the shared authentication utility (src/utils/auth.ts)
Core change is confined to a single component (MetricsDataLoader), but the diff also touches src/utils/auth.ts, a core shared utility, which is unrelated to the primary task

red_flags_applied: Technical Risk bumped from M to L: change touches src/utils/auth.ts (authentication client construction)
Component Scope bumped from S to M: touches core shared utility src/utils/auth.ts
